title: Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to join our product team. You will build and maintain user-facing features using React and TypeScript, collaborating closely with designers and backend engineers.
responsibilities: Build reusable UI components in React and TypeScript
Collaborate with UX designers to implement pixel-perfect interfaces
Optimize application performance and accessibility
Participate in code reviews and technical discussions

title: UX Designer
description: BrightLabs is hiring a UX Designer to shape the user experience across our SaaS platform. You will conduct user research, create wireframes and prototypes, and work hand-in-hand with developers to ship polished experiences.
responsibilities: Conduct user interviews and usability testing
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups in Figma
Define and maintain design system guidelines
Collaborate with product and engineering teams
requirements: Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process

title: Data Analyst
description: CloudPeak is seeking a contract Data Analyst to help turn complex datasets into actionable insights. You will build dashboards, write SQL queries, and produce reports for business stakeholders.
responsibilities: Write and optimize complex SQL queries
Build and maintain Tableau dashboards
Analyze large datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy)
Present findings to non-technical stakeholders
requirements: Experience with Tableau or similar BI tools

title: Marketing Coordinator
description: Vertex is looking for a part-time Marketing Coordinator to support our content and digital marketing efforts. You will manage social media channels, assist with SEO strategy, and track campaign performance.
responsibilities: Plan and schedule social media content
Assist in executing SEO strategies
Monitor and report on campaign analytics
Coordinate with external agencies and vendors
requirements: 1+ year of marketing or communications experience
Familiarity with Google Analytics and SEO tools
Ability to work 20–25 hours per week

title: Project Manager
description: NorthGrid is hiring an experienced Project Manager to oversee cross-functional software delivery teams. You will drive Agile ceremonies, manage timelines and budgets, and ensure successful project outcomes.
responsibilities: Lead sprint planning, retrospectives, and standups
Manage project scope, risks, and dependencies
Communicate progress and blockers to senior leadership
Coordinate across engineering, design, and QA teams
requirements: 4+ years of project management experience in tech
PMP or Scrum Master certification preferred
Strong experience with Jira and Confluence

title: Backend Engineer
description: CloudPeak is growing its backend team and needs an experienced Backend Engineer to design and maintain scalable APIs. You will work on high-throughput services and contribute to database architecture decisions.
responsibilities: Design and build RESTful APIs with Node.js
Manage and optimize MongoDB schemas and queries
Write unit and integration tests
Participate in architecture reviews and planning
requirements: Strong MongoDB or NoSQL database knowledge

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Arcline Systems is seeking a DevOps Engineer to manage cloud infrastructure and improve deployment pipelines. You will drive automation initiatives and ensure high availability of production systems.
responsibilities: Manage and provision AWS infrastructure using Terraform
Maintain and improve CI/CD pipelines
Monitor system health and respond to incidents
Containerize services using Docker and Kubernetes
requirements: 3+ years of DevOps or infrastructure engineering experience
Hands-on AWS experience (EC2, S3, RDS, EKS)

title: Product Manager
description: Meridian Digital is looking for a Product Manager to own the roadmap for our core consumer product. You will define product vision, gather customer insights, and partner with engineering and design to ship features that drive growth.
responsibilities: Define and prioritize the product roadmap
Write detailed user stories and acceptance criteria
Conduct competitive and market analysis
Analyze metrics and run A/B experiments to guide decisions
requirements: Experience working in an Agile environment
Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making skills

title: QA Engineer
description: Quantum Leap Tech needs a detail-oriented QA Engineer to ensure the quality of our web and mobile applications. You will design test plans, automate test cases, and work closely with developers to resolve defects.
responsibilities: Write and execute manual and automated test cases
Build and maintain Cypress and Selenium test suites
Perform API testing using Postman
Raise and track defects through resolution
requirements: 2+ years of QA or software testing experience
Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Synapse AI is seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to develop and deploy ML models powering our recommendation and personalization systems. You will own the full ML lifecycle from experimentation to production.
responsibilities: Design, train, and evaluate ML models using PyTorch
Build MLOps pipelines for model training and deployment
Collaborate with data scientists to productionize research models
Monitor model performance and implement improvements
requirements: 3+ years of machine learning engineering experience
Experience with MLOps tools (SageMaker, MLflow, or similar)
Solid understanding of model evaluation and A/B testing
